description: CSS colors (named, hex, rgb) and backgrounds (solid, linear/radial gradients, opacity)
visual_assertions: Named color swatches (red, blue, green, orange, purple, black) should each display with their correct background color
Hex color swatches (#1e40af blue, #dc2626 red, #059669 green) should render with accurate colors
RGB color swatches should render with colors matching their rgb() values
The solid background div should have a blue (#3b82f6) fill
The linear gradient div should show a smooth color transition from blue to purple left-to-right
The 135deg linear gradient should transition orange -> red -> pink diagonally
The radial gradient should show a circular yellow-to-orange-to-red gradient
The four opacity boxes should show the same blue color at decreasing opacity levels (1.0, 0.75, 0.50, 0.25)
Text color paragraph should appear in red, green, blue, and indigo respectively
